title: Deep autoresearch + deepinit + TDD workflow on my-github umbrella
description: Run deepinit to create AGENTS.md hierarchy, set up autoresearch mission with make verify as evaluator, apply TDD workflow to any gaps found.

stories.title: deepinit: Create root AGENTS.md for my-github umbrella
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md exists at /home/drdave/workspace/my-github/AGENTS.md (root level)
AGENTS.md contains accurate Purpose, Key Files table, Subdirectories table, For AI Agents section
All major top-level dirs (.claude/, .github/, data/, docs/, repos/, scripts/, tools/) listed in the Subdirectories table
make verify runs without errors after AGENTS.md is written

stories.title: deepinit: Create AGENTS.md for key subdirectories
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md exists in .claude/ with description of skills, settings, hooks
AGENTS.md exists in .github/ describing workflows, templates, community health files
AGENTS.md exists in scripts/ describing each script's purpose
AGENTS.md exists in tools/ describing pinned tool wrappers
AGENTS.md exists in data/brain-data/research/ describing the research dossier format
Each subdirectory AGENTS.md has correct <!-- Parent: --> tag pointing to its parent AGENTS.md

stories.title: autoresearch: Set up mission and run make verify evaluator
acceptanceCriteria: Mission file exists at .omc/autoresearch/codebase-health/mission.md describing the goal
Evaluator defined: runs make verify and captures exit code + output
First iteration evaluation JSON exists at .omc/autoresearch/codebase-health/runs/run-001/evaluations/iteration-0001.json
Evaluation JSON has boolean pass field and captures make verify exit code
make verify passes (exit 0) at time of evaluation — all actionlint, markdown, manifest, tool-assets checks pass

stories.title: TDD: Fix any make verify failures found during autoresearch
acceptanceCriteria: make verify exits 0 with no errors
make verify.actionlint exits 0 (all workflows valid)
make verify.markdown exits 0 (no markdown errors)
make verify.manifest exits 0 (28 manifest entries parse)
make verify.tools exits 0 (tool assets valid)
If new AGENTS.md files were added in US-001/002, make verify.markdown still passes (no markdown lint failures in new files)
